title: Two Foreshadowings in 20
wikitext:
[]: Two Foreshadowings in 2.0             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sat Apr 24, 2021 3:53 am I rewatched 2.0, and noticed two small "foreshadowings" of things that were ultimately revelaed in Shin. Sorry if this has been discussed on other threads, but I thought it was worth mentioning... First , when Asuka and Rei argue in the elevator and Asuka calls Rei a "doll/puppet" (人形 ningyō ), and attempts to slap her, only to have her hand caught mid air by Rei's, and notices that Rei too has multiple bandages in her fingers, suggesting that they're both more alike than Asuka thinks . SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Two Foreshadowings in 2.0             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sat Apr 24, 2021 10:01 am In that same elevator scene you have Rei mentioning that you can find happiness even without the Eva, foreshadowing Shinji's Neon Genesis in 3.0+1.0.

[]: Re: Two Foreshadowings in 2.0             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Apr 24, 2021 12:59 pm Giji Shinka wrote: In that same elevator scene you have Rei mentioning that you can find happiness even without the Eva, foreshadowing Shinji's Neon Genesis in 3.0+1.0.

[]: Re: Two Foreshadowings in 2.0             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Apr 24, 2021 1:26 pm Kendrix wrote: Though given what we now know about Rebuild Asuka's backstory, we must now consider if Rei wasn't also making mistaken assumptions here. Could Asuka actually have walked away? Well, it's unlikely that they could've disappeared her on Misato's watch, & we're not given any indication that she needed treatment/medication/maintenance the way Rei did, but she was probably technically "government property", too.

[]: Re: Two Foreshadowings in 2.0             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Apr 24, 2021 2:34 pm ElMariachi wrote: Also, I don't think that Asuka could had walked away: remember that NERV and SEELE have brainwashing technology in NTE, that they already used it once on Shinji in the past (to make him forget Yui's contact experiment) and planned to use it on him again if he strayed from his part in the plan. (Shinji only avoided that fate when he quit in 2.0 because at that moment Gendo thought that he didn't needed him thanks to the Dummy Plug system) So had Asuka actually tried to quit, she would had probably ended kidnapped, brainwashed and sent back to NERV's pilot roster.

[]: Re: Two Foreshadowings in 2.0             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Apr 24, 2021 2:43 pm Konja7 wrote: I didn't remember it was said they erase Shinji's memory. I though it was trauma the reason why Shinji forgot Yui's experiment. Also, I don't think NERV or SEELE can't totally brainwash and control Shinji. After all, Shinji also want to stop piloting the Eva in 1.0, but Misato needs to convince him.

[]: Re: Two Foreshadowings in 2.0             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Apr 24, 2021 2:52 pm ElMariachi wrote: In Q when Fuyutsuki show him a photo of Yui and tell him what happened to her, he says that his memories of the event were erased. The trauma making him forget the scene was in NGE.

[]: Re: Two Foreshadowings in 2.0             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Apr 24, 2021 4:00 pm Back in the day a number of people called it: thread/9217/Toji-and-Hikaris-Relationship-in-NME/

[]: Re: Two Foreshadowings in 2.0             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sat Apr 24, 2021 7:14 pm Giji Shinka wrote: In that same elevator scene you have Rei mentioning that you can find happiness even without the Eva, foreshadowing Shinji's Neon Genesis in 3.0+1.0.

[]: Re: Two Foreshadowings in 2.0             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Apr 24, 2021 7:30 pm DantesInferno wrote: In Q, Shinji’s synchro rate is revealed to have dropped to zero, and we all assume it is Rei inside enforcing this wish. Then, in Shin, the tables flip again and we are told that synchro 0 = synchro infinity!
